def positive_negated_boolean_reassigned_and_inverted_again():
    rule_id = "negated_boolean_reassigned_and_inverted_again"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag control flow that repeatedly flips boolean state instead of naming the intended condition directly."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
